**MASSIVE day (+141)!** Iran-war conditional favorites held from Day 1 paid off big: **IRIB broadcaster → IRIB** (0.40) **+62.6**, AWS→Bahrain (0.25) +38.8, Taliban→Rawalpindi (0.22) +34.5, fruit→South Africa (0.20) +31.9! TW now **1843.00** (day 67, ~67% resolved).

Note: **Kuwait** mistakenly shot down 3 US F-15s (friendly fire) + US troops killed there; Gulf energy strike hit **Ras Laffan (Qatar)**. Let me update the related questions (Q887402 military responsible → Kuwait).
